title: Nexus AI Orchestrator
subtitle: Multi-agent AI platform at enterprise scale
description: A production-grade multi-agent orchestration system that routes, schedules, and monitors AI workloads across hundreds of enterprise deployments. Features intelligent cost optimization, real-time observability, and a drag-and-drop agent builder.
longDescription: Built from scratch to solve the coordination problem in enterprise AI deployments. The system handles agent spawning, context management, tool use authorization, and graceful failure recovery. It processes over 50 million tokens per day while maintaining sub-200ms response times for 95% of requests.

title: PromptKit
subtitle: TypeScript toolkit for production prompt engineering
description: Open-source TypeScript library that brings software engineering discipline to prompt development. Includes typed prompt templates, automated testing, version control integration, A/B testing harness, and a visual diff tool for prompt iterations.
longDescription: Born from frustration with brittle, untested prompts breaking in production. PromptKit treats prompts as first-class code artifacts with the same quality bar as application code. It integrates directly into CI/CD pipelines and catches prompt regressions before they reach users.
highlights: Typed prompt templates with Zod validation

title: LiveContext RAG Engine
subtitle: Real-time retrieval-augmented generation over live data
description: A streaming RAG pipeline that ingests live data sources (databases, APIs, documents) and provides millisecond-latency contextual retrieval for LLM queries. Purpose-built for enterprise environments with strict data residency requirements.
longDescription: Traditional RAG systems have a staleness problem — embeddings go out of date and retrieval becomes unreliable. LiveContext solves this with an event-driven architecture where document updates automatically trigger re-embedding and cache invalidation. The result is a system where the AI always has access to the most current information.
highlights: Supports PDF, SQL, API, Confluence sources

title: Sentinel Code Review
subtitle: AI-powered code review that actually understands context
description: A GitHub App that provides intelligent code review using Claude's extended context window to understand entire codebases — not just the diff. It catches subtle bugs, suggests architectural improvements, and learns from your team's review patterns.
longDescription: Unlike other AI code review tools that only look at the changed lines, Sentinel loads the relevant modules, test files, and architectural docs into context. This enables it to catch issues like 'this change breaks the caching invariant established in utils/cache.ts' — the kind of insight that typically requires a senior engineer.
highlights: Learns team review patterns over time
Catches 3x more bugs than diff-only reviewers

title: Stripe API Explorer 2.0
subtitle: Redesigned developer experience for 4M+ developers
description: A complete ground-up rebuild of Stripe's API Explorer tool, featuring live request/response editing, AI-powered error explanations, auto-generated SDK code snippets, and an interactive guide mode for new integrators.
longDescription: The previous API Explorer was functional but created friction at exactly the wrong moment — when developers were first evaluating Stripe. The redesign focused on progressive disclosure: show just enough to get started, but reveal the full power of the API as developers grow. The AI error explanation feature turned cryptic error codes into actionable guidance.
highlights: AI error explanations for 200+ error codes
